calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-21-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-14-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Loew, via ZOOM, counsel for Donny H. Lau, Petitioner.

The court begins by advising counsel that there had been a question regarding whether the will is self-proving by the subscribing witness statements. The court then advises counsel that a bond amount would need to be determined to protect any potential creditors. Counsel reports that he does not believe that any significant creditors exist.

The court then asks if anyone is present to object to the petition. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 11, 2003, is admitted to probate. Donny H. Lau is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 21, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
